prestazioni: M178 LS2 4.0L V8 Biturbo (GT2-spec) upgraded with a custom HGP Turbo Systems GTX5544R Gen II turbocharger (86mm compressor, 106mm turbine, 64mm wastegate) paired with a billet aluminum compressor wheel for 3.2 bar boost targeting 950+ HP on 102 RON fuel, utilizing a Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate with dual springs for precise boost control

Full titanium 4-2-1 equal-length exhaust manifold by Akrapovič with 3.5-inch diameter Inconel primary tubes and merge collectors, paired with a 4-inch titanium center section and carbon fiber mufflers for optimized scavenging and weight reduction (saving 18kg over OEM)

Custom Motec M150 ECU with GT2-specific firmware, integrated with a Bosch Motorsport MS2.8 high-pressure direct injection system (350 bar rail pressure) and a secondary port injection kit by Injector Dynamics ID2000x (2000cc/min) for dual-injection fueling, calibrated for 30% ethanol blend (E30) with a Radium Engineering dual-pump fuel surge tank and Walbro 450 LPH brushless pumps

Ohlins TTX46 MkII 3-way adjustable coilovers with GT2-specific valving, 24-position rebound, and 22-position compression damping, paired with spherical bearing top mounts by GT3-spec Mercedes-Benz Motorsport and adjustable anti-roll bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) by H&R for flat cornering dynamics

AP Racing CP9460-1000 6-piston front and CP9461-800 4-piston rear brake calipers with 400mm x 38mm two-piece carbon-ceramic rotors (CCM-X) and Pagid RSX1 racing pads, utilizing a Bosch Motorsport ABS 9.3 system with 12-stage adjustability and a custom brake bias valve by Tilton Engineering
estetica: Full carbon fiber GT2 Pro aero kit by Mercedes-AMG Motorsport, including a 200mm adjustable rear wing with dual-plane Gurney flaps (3D-printed titanium endplates), front splitter with integrated dive planes, and side skirts with vortex generators, all coated in matte Satin Silver (DB 775) with exposed carbon weave accents

Custom widebody conversion by RAUH-Welt Begriff (RWB) for the GT2 Pro, featuring hand-beaten aluminum fenders (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear) with riveted seams and integrated air vents for brake cooling, finished in Mercedes-Benz Designo Magno Selenite Grey (990) with gloss black contrast stripes

Full interior overhaul with a GT2-spec roll cage by Matter Motorsport (FIA 8862-2018 certified) in 4130 chromoly steel, paired with a Sparco Pro 2000 carbon fiber racing seat (FIA 8855-1999), Schroth 6-point harnesses, and a custom Alcantara-wrapped AMG Performance steering wheel with integrated Motec C127 dash display

Custom forged aluminum wheels by BBS FI-R (18x12 front, 18x13 rear) with center-lock hubs, 5x130 PCD, and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (305/660R18 front, 325/705R18 rear), finished in gloss black with polished lip and AMG Motorsport center caps

Exterior lighting upgraded to Hella Rallye 3000 Compact LED headlights with bi-xenon projectors and adaptive cornering, paired with custom LED taillights by LUX Automotive with sequential turn signals and integrated brake cooling ducts
